code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent sentence. Each predicate is rendered with a simple template; the clauses
    are concatenated with commas.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple predicate‑to‑phrase mapping
    templates = {
        "league": "plays in the {obj} league",
        "manager": "is managed by {obj}",
        "position": "holds the position of {obj}",
        "ground": "plays at {obj}",
        "birthDate": "was born on {obj}",
        "birthPlace": "was born in {obj}",
        "birthYear": "was born in {obj}",
        "club": "played for {obj}",
        "draftTeam": "was drafted by {obj}",
        "height": "is {obj} meters tall",
        "youthclub": "started at youth club {obj}",
        "currentclub": "currently plays for {obj}",
        "weight": "weighs {obj}",
        "deathPlace": "died in {obj}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": "started his active years in {obj}",
        "currentteam": "currently plays for {obj}",
        "debutTeam": "made his debut with {obj}",
        "draftPick": "was picked {obj}",
        "draftRound": "in round {obj}",
        "formerTeam": "formerly played for {obj}",
        "playerNumber": "wears number {obj}",
        "college": "attended {obj}",
        "draftYear": "was drafted in {obj}",
        "coach": "is coached by {obj}",
        "owner": "is owned by {obj}",
        "city": "is based in {obj}",
        "leader": "is led by {obj}",
        "anthem": "has anthem \"{obj}\"",
        "ethnicGroup": "has ethnic group {obj}",
        "language": "speaks {obj}",
        "generalManager": "has general manager {obj}",
        "chairman": "has chairman {obj}",
        "season": "participated in {obj}",
        "currency": "uses the {obj} as currency",
        "demonym": "people are called {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "official language is {obj}",
        "stadium": "plays at {obj}",
        "universityTeam": "represents {obj}",
        "mostChampions": "has most championships: {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "has leader title {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {obj}",
        "country": "is in {obj}",
        "utcOffset": "has UTC offset {obj}",
        "timeZone": "is in time zone {obj}",
        "areaTotal": "covers an area of {obj}",
        "foundingDate": "was founded on {obj}",
    }

    subject = triples[0].subject
    clauses = []

    for triple in triples:
        tmpl = templates.get(triple.predicate)
        if tmpl:
            clause = tmpl.format(obj=triple.object)
        else:
            # Fallback generic wording
            clause = f"{triple.predicate} {triple.object}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    sentence = f"{subject} " + ", ".join(clauses) + "."
    # Capitalise first character (subject may already be capitalised)
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
